description: A square designed graphic in ICE's recurring 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is the same desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed human hands against a dark torso, used as a generic stand-in instead of a photo of the named subject. A red diagonal banner across the top-right corner reads 'CHICAGO' in white serif caps. The top-left headline is in light cyan bold sans-serif caps, 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with white sub-line '2/17/2025 | Chicago , IL.' The subject's name appears large in white bold sans-serif: 'Thang Lam Kap.' Beneath is the white 'CRIME:' label and one bulleted charge: 'Child molestation.' Bottom left shows the DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom right is a red box with '-THE- WORST FIRST' in white serif. This is a fixed agency propaganda template that pairs an anonymized handcuffs image with a named arrestee and an emphasized child-sex charge to portray immigration detainees as dangerous predators and to justify removals. Intended audience is the general public and enforcement supporters.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/17/2025 | Chicago, IL; Thang Lam Kap; CRIME: Child molestation; CHICAGO; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
